Finance Gateway

API Documentation

HomeOverviewGetting StartedAuthenticationTransactionsCustomersSubscriptionsSplit PaymentsWebhooksBalance & LedgerSettlementsTransfersDisputesCard TokensKYC VerificationCompliance & AML3D SecureAPI Playground

Finance Gateway API

Enterprise payment gateway API — process payments, manage customers, handle subscriptions, split payments, transfer funds, and reconcile settlements.

Read the DocsTry the API

Fast

Rust-powered core engine handles thousands of transactions per second with sub-millisecond latency.

Secure

AES-256-GCM encryption, PCI-compliant tokenization, KYC/AML compliance, and audit trails.

Developer First

Full Swagger docs, interactive playground, webhook testing, and client SDKs.

Quick Start

1. Generate an API key

curl http://localhost:9090/api/v1/generate-key?key_type=test

2. Initialize a transaction

curl -X POST http://localhost:8080/api/v1/transactions/initialize   -H "Authorization: Bearer sk_test_your_key"   -H "Content-Type: application/json"   -d '{"email":"customer@example.com","amount":5000,"currency":"NGN"}'

3. View Swagger docs

open http://localhost:8080/api/docs
